name: FNDS3000 Corp.
summary: FNDS3000 Corp. provides prepaid debit card solutions in South Africa. The company's payment processing platform supports payroll, insurance, medical aid, gift card and corporate incentives, prepaid cellular charges, and small-scale international funds transfer. Its products include microfinance cards; payroll cards for wages and salaries; and other prepaid cards. The company was formerly known as FundsTech Corp. and changed its name to FNDS3000 Corp. in March 2008. FNDS3000 Corp. was founded in 2006 and is based in Jacksonville, Florida.
